name: Q1 2024 Board Memo.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
BRD-001  Q1 2024 Board Memo
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Q1 2024 Board Memo
Executive memo summarising vendor risk posture and readiness for the board risk committee.
Document ID
BRD-001
Prepared By
Corporate Strategy Office
Prepared Date
2024-03-29
Audience
Board Risk and Audit Committee
Status
Pending library sync
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Executive Summary
Meridian’s AI search and knowledge-operations initiative remains on schedule for a controlled Q2 launch. The Northwind
vendor package is not yet fully contract-ready; however, targeted remediation is underway and management has isolated
the only temporary waiver to service availability for the pilot phase.
Open Matters Requiring Oversight
Area
Current Position
Management Plan
Liability
MSA draft retains uncapped liability.
Hold execution until baseline cap is accepted or alternate
structure approved.
Privacy / Transfers
SCC appendix not yet executed.
Privacy Counsel to complete appendix and supplemental
measures memo.
Availability
SLA currently at 99.5%.
Pilot-phase risk acceptance approved through 2024-06-30
only.
Evidence / Controls
Access approval artifact was late to
archive.
Issue closed with remediation note and updated evidence
checklist.
Decision Request
Management requests acknowledgement that (1) launch remains conditional on closure of liability and transfer issues, and
(2) the temporary availability waiver is acceptable for the pilot only, subject to monthly reporting.
Board Reporting Metrics
●
Contract execution readiness: Amber
●
Privacy transfer readiness: Amber
●
Operational control remediation: Green
●
Pilot availability exception: Amber
